description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs in the security_release stages. Add a manual job security_release_verify:start in stage security_release:verify:start that runs `bundle exec rake 'security:verify:start'`. Add a job security_release_verify:check_docker_tags in stage security_release:verify that depends on the start job and runs `bundle exec rake 'security:verify:check_docker_tags'`. Add a job security_release_verify:check_omnibus_packages_publishing in the same stage that also depends on the start job and runs `bundle exec rake 'security:verify:check_omnibus_packages_publishing'`. All three jobs should only run when the pipeline source is pipeline, web, or api and the variable SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE is set to verify or true.
